name: No Fail Lasagna
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the covering sauce by melting butter in a microwave-safe bowl, adding diced onion and microwaving on high for 1 minute. Stir in flour, then add milk. Microwave at high until the mixture begins to boil and thickens, stirring occasionally to prevent lumps.
2. Alternatively, melt butter in a frying pan, sauté onions, then stir in flour and milk. Cook over medium heat, adding onion later.
3. Add Parmesan cheese and salt; stir.
4. In a separate bowl, beat egg yolks slightly, add a small amount of the sauce, and mix well with the eggs. Pour into the sauce, stirring constantly. Set aside.
5. Brown ground beef in a pan until cooked through. Drain excess fat. Stir into the sauce (use any prepared sauce; a mildly spiced one works best). Set aside.
6. If using a homemade spaghetti sauce that contains ground beef, skip this step.
7. Preheat oven to 325°F (165°C).
8. Grease a 9" x 13" x 2" baking dish with butter or cooking spray.
9. Add a layer of spaghetti sauce on the bottom of the dish.
10. Place a single layer of lasagna noodles over the sauce.
11. Spread a layer of mozzarella cheese, followed by ricotta (or cottage cheese).
12. Repeat layers until all ingredients are used, reserving some noodles for topping.
13. Pour any remaining sauce evenly over the top of the lasagna.
14. Sprinkle additional Parmesan cheese on the surface.
15. Bake at 325°F (165°C) for 25 minutes. Broil briefly to brown the top.
16. Let stand for 10 minutes before serving.
Serve with French bread and garlic butter.
